series_metadata.series_description: All materials submitted by entities for the establishment of specific funds, which includes requests by form and correspondence, governing authority for the creation of the fund, LGS review results, correspondence/e-mails to entity with determination. Also contained in this series the maintenance of audit-request information and entity fund requirement inquiry requests and reviews.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while needed then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: Permanent, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
